per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The corrections were mostly clear but lacked specificity in some areas, such as the methods for handling missing data.
The corrections were relevant and directly addressed the identified issues, particularly regarding the normality assumption and benchmark justification.
There was some iterative improvement, but the student did not fully resolve all issues, and marking 'done' was premature.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding with relevant corrections but lacked specificity and full resolution of issues.
